greeting: Hi there! I'm AVA 👋 I can answer quick questions about Adel's services, pricing, process, and more. What would you like to know?
fallback: Hmm, I don't have a canned answer for that one yet. Try one of the topics below, or use the contact form so Adel can answer you personally!
quickQuestions: How long does a project take?
What tools do you work with?

faqs.answer: Adel offers 5 core services: n8n Automation, Zapier Automation, AI Agents, API Integrations, and Business Process Automation. Scroll up to the Services section for the full breakdown of each one!

Pricing depends on the complexity and scope of your automation — a simple Zap is very different from a multi-agent AI system. The best move is to send a quick message with what you need automated, and Adel will get back to you with a clear quote. No generic pricing table here, sorry! 🙏

Most single-workflow automations (like a Zapier or n8n setup) take about 3–7 business days. Larger projects with AI agents or multiple integrations usually run 2–4 weeks. Adel will give you a specific timeline once he understands your project scope.
Easy — just scroll down to the Contact section and send a message describing what you'd like to automate, your current tools, and your goals. Adel typically replies within 24 hours.
Adel's main toolkit: n8n, Zapier, OpenAI/GPT-4, Claude, Python, and REST/GraphQL/Webhook APIs — plus whatever CRM, helpdesk, or messaging platforms your business already runs on.

Check the little status badge in the hero section at the top of the page — it always reflects Adel's current availability for new projects. If it says "Available for Projects," you're good to reach out!
Take a look at the Projects section above — it includes real examples like an AI Facebook Page Agent, a full Dental Clinic automation suite, a lead-gen pipeline, and a Customer Support AI agent.
You can see Adel's skill breakdown (n8n, Zapier, AI/LLM integration, API development, Python, and process automation) with proficiency levels in the Skills section above.
You can email adelauditor05@gmail.com directly, message via Facebook, or just use the contact form right below on this page — whichever is easiest for you!

Adel works remotely and collaborates with clients across different time zones — async communication and clear documentation make that easy. Mention your time zone in your message if scheduling a call matters to you.

Check the Workflow section above — it walks through the 5-step process most automations follow: Trigger, Processing, AI Decision, Action, and Notification, complete with error handling and monitoring built in.
Yes — Adel can set up ongoing monitoring and support after launch so your automations keep running smoothly. Just mention you'd like ongoing support when you reach out.
